_meta.purpose: Category-specific ad recipes injected into Haiku user message at runtime. Extends the 14 hardcoded recipes in the system prompt without bloating the cache. New categories can be added here without code changes.
_meta.fields: aliases (list of keyword triggers), hero_patterns, subhead_style, benefit_labels, trust_signals, cta_patterns, tagline_style, photography, color_palette, lighting, composition, aspect_default

medical_pharma.subhead_style: calm reassuring sentence, 5-10 words, clinical confidence
medical_pharma.tagline_style: calm assurance about wellness or recovery; never make health claims that overpromise
medical_pharma.photography: Clinical-clean white background OR lifestyle of a recovered, smiling person with soft medical lighting; product packaging shown frontal with dosage info legible
medical_pharma.color_palette: Clinical white 50% + trust-blue 25% + sage green 15% + neutral grey 10%
medical_pharma.lighting: Soft, even, medically clean - high-key with minimal shadow, gentle fill from all sides
medical_pharma.composition: Product or healthy-lifestyle hero with calm composition, certifications strip prominently bottom

ayurveda_herbal.subhead_style: warm earthy sentence with classical Sanskrit reference, evokes lineage
ayurveda_herbal.tagline_style: wisdom + nature blend; e.g. 'From the Vedas to your wellness'
ayurveda_herbal.photography: Mortar and pestle with raw herbs, terracotta pot, copper utensil, brass lamp, scattered dried roots and leaves; warm sun-side lighting catching the powder dust
ayurveda_herbal.color_palette: Earthy terracotta 30% + sage green 25% + warm cream 25% + saffron-gold 15% + bark brown 5%
ayurveda_herbal.lighting: Warm sun-lit window light with slight golden haze, soft bounce, natural practical glow
ayurveda_herbal.composition: Hero product flanked by raw herbs and traditional vessels, hand pouring or mortar-and-pestle in mid-action, certifications bottom strip

packaging_design.subhead_style: single product descriptor (e.g. 'Cold-pressed Olive Oil'); legible at shelf distance
packaging_design.tagline_style: clean factual product descriptor, never abstract poetry
packaging_design.photography: Product packaging shown FRONTAL on a clean shelf or studio cyc; macro detail of label legibility; show side panel + back panel mockup variants if multi-angle; specular highlight on metallic finish
packaging_design.color_palette: Brand primary (typically saturated) 50% + product-category accent 30% + clean white background 20%; ALWAYS include the green-dot vegetarian mark or red-dot non-vegetarian mark for food/pharma packaging
packaging_design.lighting: Studio softbox key from upper-front, sharp shadow, flat overhead for top-of-pack reads, polarized to control reflections on glossy surfaces
packaging_design.composition: Pack centered or 3/4 angle, label fully legible at thumbnail size, brand wordmark dominates upper third of pack, regulatory marks bottom-third

pet_care.subhead_style: warm playful one-liner about the pet's wellbeing
pet_care.tagline_style: emotional bond between owner and pet
pet_care.photography: Hero pet (dog/cat) mid-action with tongue out or ears up, OR product hero with kibble spilling, warm golden side-light, shallow DoF on the pet's eyes
pet_care.color_palette: Warm honey-gold 40% + soft cream 30% + brand accent (red/blue/green) 20% + chocolate brown 10%
pet_care.lighting: Warm window-side light, golden bias, soft fill, catchlight in the pet's eyes
pet_care.composition: Pet hero left or right with product on opposite side, brand mark top-left, trust strip bottom

baby_kids.subhead_style: tender warm sentence about safety and softness
baby_kids.photography: Baby hands or feet detail, soft pastel-bathed setting, mother's hand caressing the product, ultra-soft window light
baby_kids.color_palette: Soft pastel cream 40% + powder pink/blue 25% + mint or lavender 15% + warm brown text 20%
baby_kids.lighting: Diffused window light with high-key fill, no hard shadows, dreamy soft glow
baby_kids.composition: Tender hero with hands, product on right, brand top-left, certifications bottom

religious_spiritual.subhead_style: blessing or shubh muhurat phrase in Hindi/Sanskrit + English
religious_spiritual.tagline_style: devotional, may include Sanskrit shloka snippet
religious_spiritual.photography: Diya, marigold petals scattered, brass kalash, sandalwood paste, rangoli border; warm golden practical light; deity silhouette or motif tastefully integrated
religious_spiritual.color_palette: Saffron 30% + maroon-red 25% + warm gold 20% + ivory cream 15% + tulsi green 10%
religious_spiritual.lighting: Warm candle-lit / diya-lit, soft golden glow, slight haze; reverent atmosphere
religious_spiritual.composition: Hero motif (deity / lamp / flower) center, devotional copy framing, ornate border, festive props at corners

books_publishing.subhead_style: evocative book tagline, 6-12 words, hints at the central conflict
books_publishing.tagline_style: literary hook; one sentence that makes a reader stop
books_publishing.photography: Hero book cover hovering over a dark moody surface OR styled flat-lay with coffee, glasses, fountain pen, ink swirls; macro detail of cover stock and foil
books_publishing.color_palette: Cover-driven: usually deep blacks/burgundy/forest-green with single foil accent; cream paper highlights
books_publishing.lighting: Single hard key from upper-left creating strong rim on the cover edge, dark falloff, slight grain
books_publishing.composition: Cover hero center or 3/4, author name + tagline beneath, blurb quote box on the side

music_albums.subhead_style: evocative one-line album tagline or release date
music_albums.tagline_style: evocative phrase that captures the album's mood
music_albums.photography: Artist editorial portrait OR conceptual album-cover-style hero (object, motif, abstract); dramatic single-source lighting; bold contrast
music_albums.color_palette: Genre-driven: hip-hop = neon-on-black; indie = washed-out pastels; metal = blood-red on black; electronic = cyan-magenta-black
music_albums.lighting: Editorial portrait light or conceptual studio with hard color gels
music_albums.composition: Artist or motif fills 2/3, title typography fills the rest, streaming platform icons row at bottom

podcast_audio.subhead_style: topic hook for this episode/season, 8-15 words
podcast_audio.tagline_style: conversational hook; 'we talk about X' style
podcast_audio.photography: Host portrait with headphones / mic, OR conceptual cover with motif; warm studio lighting; sometimes microphone macro
podcast_audio.color_palette: Two-tone bold: usually a brand color + black, or muted earthy with bright accent
podcast_audio.lighting: Studio key with warm bias, slight rim, intentional simplicity
podcast_audio.composition: Host or motif on left, show title big right, mic-and-headphones icon row, platform logos bottom

political_ngo.subhead_style: stat or call-to-action, 8-12 words, emotional but factual
political_ngo.photography: Documentary style of beneficiaries or rally crowds, low color saturation, golden-hour or harsh midday for impact, faces in dignity not pity
political_ngo.color_palette: Mission-driven: usually two strong colors (red+white, blue+yellow) with high contrast
political_ngo.lighting: Documentary natural light, slight grain, hopeful even when serious
political_ngo.composition: Hero subject (face or scene) fills 60%, copy column with stat on left, donate CTA bottom-right, regulatory bottom

sports_team.photography: Hero athlete in mid-action sweat-detail, OR team huddle backlit by stadium floods, OR jersey hero on dark; harsh rim-light, dramatic action freeze
sports_team.color_palette: Team primary 60% + team secondary 25% + black 10% + warm gold accent 5%
sports_team.lighting: Stadium floods, hard rim, contrasty cinematic, sweat catching light
sports_team.composition: Hero athlete or team huddle fills 2/3, match details column on left, sponsor logos bottom

movies_streaming.subhead_style: evocative tagline that captures the central conflict, 6-10 words
movies_streaming.tagline_style: high-concept hook; reveals the conflict not the plot
movies_streaming.photography: Hero actor portrait with dramatic rim light OR conceptual key art (object/motif/silhouette); deep cinematic shadows; bold color grade
movies_streaming.color_palette: Genre-driven: thriller = teal+orange; horror = blood-red on black; romance = warm pastels; sci-fi = cyan+blue+purple
movies_streaming.lighting: Cinematic key with strong rim, deep shadow falloff, dramatic side-light
movies_streaming.composition: Hero actor/motif fills upper 2/3, title block lower 1/3, cast names/credits bottom strip, laurel marks if award-nominated

gaming_esports.photography: Hero character render in dynamic action pose, neon-tinted rim light, particle FX (sparks, embers, smoke), cinematic 3D lighting
gaming_esports.color_palette: Neon (electric blue + magenta + acid yellow) on deep blacks, OR moody desaturated greens for tactical games
gaming_esports.lighting: Cinematic 3D rim light, neon practical fill, particle glow, lens flare
gaming_esports.composition: Character hero center, weapon/loadout silhouette beside, title big top, platform logos (PC/PS5/Xbox) bottom

dating_app.photography: Two warmly-lit phones showing the app interface, OR a smiling couple lifestyle shot, soft warm window light, intimate framing
dating_app.color_palette: Brand pink/red 40% + soft cream 30% + warm peach 20% + brand accent 10%
dating_app.lighting: Warm sunset bias, soft fill, intimate glow
dating_app.composition: Phone mockups center or right, copy left, couple lifestyle inset (optional), CTA pill bottom

crypto_web3.photography: Floating phone mockup with crypto interface, holographic gradient rim, neon glow, abstract chain-link visuals OR token render
crypto_web3.color_palette: Deep space black 50% + electric cyan 20% + neon magenta 15% + holographic gradient 15%
crypto_web3.lighting: Holographic gradient backlight, sharp neon rim, dark studio gradient
crypto_web3.composition: Device mockup or token render center, spec callouts on side, brand wordmark top, CTA bottom

restaurant_cafe.photography: Hero plate of signature dish with steam, OR warmly-lit dining room with golden hour streaming through windows, OR chef plating in mid-action
restaurant_cafe.color_palette: Warm earth tones (terracotta + cream + olive + brass) for intimate places, or bold pop colors for casual diners
restaurant_cafe.lighting: Golden window-side, warm practical bulbs, slight bounce, intimate atmosphere
restaurant_cafe.composition: Hero food or interior fills 2/3, address+hours on left or right, social handles bottom

salon_spa.photography: Hands giving a treatment, candle and warm towels, marble + wood interior, soft warm light
salon_spa.color_palette: Warm cream + dusty rose + sage green + brushed brass accents
salon_spa.lighting: Soft warm window-light with intimate practical glow
salon_spa.composition: Lifestyle hero on right, services list on left, address bottom

dental_clinic.subhead_style: calm reassuring sentence about painless care
dental_clinic.photography: Patient with confident smile, OR clean clinical interior with modern equipment, soft cool lighting
dental_clinic.color_palette: Trust-blue 40% + clinical white 35% + mint green 15% + warm accent 10%
dental_clinic.lighting: Clean even high-key, no shadows, optimistic
dental_clinic.composition: Patient smile hero or clinic interior, services list, doctor credentials, contact strip bottom

optical_eyewear.photography: Macro of frames detail, OR styled portrait of model wearing the frames, soft editorial lighting, lens reflections
optical_eyewear.color_palette: Sophisticated muted (charcoal + cream + tortoise + brand accent)
optical_eyewear.lighting: Editorial portrait key, slight rim catching the lens, soft fill
optical_eyewear.composition: Frame macro or model hero, frame collection grid optional, store address bottom

school_k12.subhead_style: warm aspirational sentence about child's future
school_k12.photography: Children in uniform learning, lab activity, sports field, classroom; bright optimistic light, faces in focus
school_k12.color_palette: School colors (often blue + yellow + white) or warm academic tones
school_k12.lighting: Bright outdoor or naturally-lit classroom, optimistic and clean
school_k12.composition: Children hero with classroom/campus context, key stats column, contact + apply CTA bottom

coaching_test_prep.subhead_style: stats + stake; e.g. 'Last year 200+ AIRs under 100'
coaching_test_prep.photography: Top scorers with rank cards, OR focused student studying with books and laptop, OR teacher at whiteboard, bright optimistic lighting
coaching_test_prep.color_palette: Trust-blue + warm gold + cream + bold accent for urgency
coaching_test_prep.composition: Top-scorer hero or focused student, rank stats column, demo CTA bottom

wedding_services.photography: Bride/groom intimate moment, OR decor wide shot with floral arches and lighting, OR bridal portrait detail, golden-hour warm
wedding_services.color_palette: Cream + dusty rose + sage + rose-gold + ivory
wedding_services.lighting: Golden-hour warmth, soft window light, intimate glow
wedding_services.composition: Couple/decor hero, services list, contact bottom

florist_bouquet.photography: Hero bouquet on a marble or rustic wooden surface, hand-tying detail, water droplets on petals, soft golden window light
florist_bouquet.lighting: Soft window-side, golden practical, ultra-soft fill
florist_bouquet.composition: Bouquet hero center, hand inserting a stem, occasion options column, CTA bottom

bakery_cake.photography: Hero cake with icing detail and glaze drip, slice cross-section showing crumb, warm display-case glow, pastry hands in motion
bakery_cake.color_palette: Cream + pastel pink + soft brown + golden caramel + brand accent
bakery_cake.lighting: Warm bakery practical light, golden window-bias, intimate
bakery_cake.composition: Hero cake or pastry on right, occasion menu on left, contact bottom

legal_services.photography: Lawyer at desk with case files OR scales-of-justice motif OR courthouse architecture, formal lighting, dignified
legal_services.color_palette: Deep navy + cream + gold accent + rich burgundy
legal_services.lighting: Formal directional key with deep shadows, classic portrait lighting
legal_services.composition: Lawyer portrait or motif hero, practice areas list, contact prominently bottom

insurance_finance.photography: Multi-generational family lifestyle, OR couple smiling at advisor, OR umbrella-over-family conceptual, warm lifestyle lighting
insurance_finance.color_palette: Trust-blue 50% + warm cream 30% + gold accent 10% + warm earth 10%
insurance_finance.lighting: Warm natural family lighting, hopeful and optimistic
insurance_finance.composition: Family hero, plan benefits column, premium calculator widget, regulatory bottom

loans_credit.photography: Happy customer with new house/car keys, OR phone showing app approval, OR family-in-new-home lifestyle, warm aspirational
loans_credit.composition: Customer hero with achieved-dream context, rate column, apply CTA bottom

astrology_numerology.photography: Cosmic constellation overlay, zodiac wheel, palm with henna, kundli chart, candle-lit ritual setup, mystical purple-gold lighting
astrology_numerology.color_palette: Deep cosmic violet 40% + saffron-gold 25% + midnight blue 20% + cream 15%
astrology_numerology.lighting: Mystical candle-lit warmth with cosmic backdrop, slight haze
astrology_numerology.composition: Mystical motif hero, services menu, astrologer credentials, book CTA

yoga_meditation.photography: Yoga pose hero in soft natural light, OR meditator with mountain/ocean backdrop, OR rolled mat with wooden floor, warm dawn light
yoga_meditation.color_palette: Sage green 30% + cream 30% + warm sand 20% + dusty rose accent 20%
yoga_meditation.lighting: Soft dawn or sunset light, warm bias, intimate calm
yoga_meditation.composition: Yoga pose or meditator hero, class schedule, app download CTA
